description: Perform a static setup for Finite Element Analysis (FEM) on the mechanical part located at /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_housing_bracket.FCStd. Assign 'Steel-Generic' material to the bracket body and apply a fixed constraint to the flat bottom face lying on the XY plane. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/T8_bracket_fem.FCStd.
